overall_summary: Development on June 2-3 focused on significant architectural stabilization of ElizaCloud and the core orchestrator, alongside a major community-led effort to integrate the Kamino Solana protocol. Key technical updates include the promotion of the Cloud V2 stack to main and the resolution of duplicate reply race conditions.
key_facts: The ElizaOS Cloud V2 stack was promoted from the develop branch to main via PR #8116 by standujar on June 1.
A comprehensive Kamino protocol plugin was proposed by n4vnt to enable lending, borrowing, and liquidity actions for ElizaOS agents on Solana.
PR #8080 by lalalune introduced an agent-surface framework enabling plugin views to be agent-controllable with sleep/wake lifecycle endpoints.
Core orchestrator race conditions that caused duplicate replies were closed in PR #8161.
The project identified four distinct ecosystem architecture components: ElizaOS (framework), ElizaCloud (hosting), Milady (UI), and Waifu (agent economies).
Stan0473 confirmed that all plugin development must now target the elizaOS/eliza repository develop branch with frequent rebases required.
NubsCarson reported a critical narration-envelope defect (issue #8162) where sub-agent deliverables are dropped or garbled during parent model rendering.
A high-performance decision engine for DeFi agents, Arsenal Quant, was introduced featuring MCP integration and L402 Lightning payments.
Automated workspace package installation was implemented to fix reliability issues with fresh-clone builds.
open_questions: Should consumer-side bundling policies be adjusted or app-core modified to resolve transitive dependency externalization (issue 8142)?

new_issues_prs.title: release: promote develop → main (Cloud V2 sync)
new_issues_prs.author: standujar
new_issues_prs.significance: Synchronizes production with the new Cloud V2 infrastructure stack.

new_issues_prs.title: Claude/agentic views surface
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Adds view-action affinity and agent-controllable plugin interfaces.

new_issues_prs.title: orchestrator: sub-agent completion narration drops/garbles the deliverable
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Critical presentation defect affecting how sub-agent task results are reported to users.

new_issues_prs.title: feat(ui): continuous-chat overlay + restored app shell
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Reintroduces full 3-panel chat workspace and adds a Her-style glass chat overlay.

overall_focus.claim: Development shifted toward refining agent intelligence by improving sub-agent routing and suppressing internal process chatter from user-facing replies.

discord_updates.summary: Clarification of the ecosystem architecture (ElizaOS vs ElizaCloud vs Milady vs Waifu) and technical planning for the Kamino Solana plugin.
Debate regarding DeFi integration strategies: multi-chain abstraction layers (presented by Smeltor) versus protocol-specific 'go-to-market' plugins (suggested by n4vnt).

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users reporting first-use stalls in the desktop application; developers responded by implementing deferred model warmup for embeddings.

strategic_insights.insight: Building protocol-specific plugins like Kamino is being used as a strategic 'go-to-market' tool to attract protocol-level attention and partnerships.
implications_or_questions: Should ElizaOS prioritize individual 'brand' plugins over generic multi-chain abstractions?

strategic_insights.insight: The centralization of all plugins into the main repository develop branch suggests a push toward a monolithic core with strict rebase requirements to manage rapid velocity.
implications_or_questions: Will this increase the barrier to entry for casual community contributors?

market_analysis.observation: Introduction of Arsenal Quant and Decision Engine targeting the 'DeFAI' (Decentralized Finance AI) space.
market_analysis.relevance: Emergent competition or partnership opportunity in high-performance decision oracles for agents.
